scripts.build: npm run build --workspace omega-pac && npm run build --workspace omega-target && npm run build --workspace omega-web && npm run build:ts && node build-ts/build.mjs
scripts.build:ts: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json && tsc -p tsconfig.build-script.json
scripts.dev: npm link omega-target && npm link omega-web && npm link omega-pac
scripts.release: npm run build --workspace omega-pac && npm run build --workspace omega-target && npm run build --workspace omega-web && npm run build:ts && node build-ts/build.mjs release
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.build-script.json --noEmit
